Task description (Navigate to the Payments module) and environment seed script which enables the Payments tab.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to enter specific, synthetic data into Manager.io to record a payment. It is verified that the environment seed scripts initialize the required entities: a supplier named Exotic Liquids, a bank account named Cash on Hand, and enable the Payments module. The expected amount (2750.00), date (2024-01-20), and description (Payment for January beverage shipment) exactly match the instructions provided to the agent.
